productDisplayName: Fila Men Trackfield Black Sports Shoes
description: Enjoy great vacations in these Trackfield shoes from fila. Trackfield, with its mesh upper and offers great comfort and Fit. Team these shoes with casual t-shirts and denims.UpperMeshed upper for maximum ventilation and synthetic overlays for structureStitch detailing in ridges for durability, added structure to the upper and midfoot supportReinforced overlay at the heel cup for extra support to the backfootOutsole reinforced onto the toe box for durability and added protection to the forefootBrand name on the side for styleMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorptionOutsoleOutsole with terraced waffle patterned lugs on the forefootCurved midfootHigh, scooped heelshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
